time.description: The target date and time for achieving the checkpoint value in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

name.description: The name of the checkpoint.

value.description: The value of the checkpoint.

id.description: The unique identifier of the checkpoint.

value.description: The numerical value of the card outcome, constrained within the specified range.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the card outcome value was recorded.

last_modified_by_user_id.description: The ID of the user who last modified the value.

outcome_id.description: The unique identifier for the card outcome.

id.description: The unique identifier for the card outcome value.

predictions.description:
A list of forecasted values for the card outcome, each associated with a specific date.
The predictions cover at least the next 30 days or extend to the latest of the card's deadline or planned end date, if they occur after the 30 day period.

date.description: The date for which the forecasted value is provided.

value.description: The forecasted value for the card outcome on the specified date.

onDeadline.description: The forecasted value of the card outcome on the card's deadline date.

date.description: The deadline date for the card outcome, formatted as `YYYY-MM-DD`.

value.description: The forecasted value of the card outcome on the deadline date.

onPlannedEndDate.description: The forecasted value of the card outcome on the card's planned end date.

date.description: The planned end date for the card outcome, formatted as `YYYY-MM-DD`.

value.description: The forecasted value of the card outcome on the planned end date.

onTargetValue.description: The forecasted date when the card outcome is expected to reach or surpass the target value, along with the forecasted value on that date.

date.description: The date when the card outcome is expected to reach or surpass the target value, formatted as `YYYY-MM-DD`.

value.description: The forecasted value of the card outcome on the target value date.

subtask_id.description: The unique identifier of the subtask.

description.description: The contents of the subtask.

owner_user_id.description: The ID of the user who is assigned to the subtask.

deadline.description: The deadline for the subtask, represented in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

finished_at.description: The date and time when the subtask was marked as finished, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

created_at.description: The date and time when the subtask was created, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

position.description: The position of the subtask within the list of subtasks. `0` represents the top-most position.

id.description: The unique identifier of the attachment.

file_name.description: The name of the file associated with the attachment.

link.description: The link to the attachment file. For files uploaded through the application UI, this link is represented as a path that starts with `/files/` followed by a unique string identifier for the file.

attachment_id.description: The unique identifier of the card attachment used as the cover image.

width.description: The width of the cover image in pixels.

height.description: The height of the cover image in pixels.

link.description: The link to the cover image file. For images uploaded as attachments through the application UI, this link is represented as a path that starts with `/coverImages/` followed by the unique string identifier for the attached file.

allOf.description: Card attachment with included position value.

position.description: The position of the attachment within the list of attachments. `0` represents the top-most position.

file_name.description: The name of the file associated with the attachment.

link.description:
The link to the attachment file.
For files uploaded through the application UI, this is a path starting with `/files/` followed by a unique string identifier.
For external files, this can be a full URL pointing to the file's location.

id.description: The unique identifier of the card comment attachment.

parent_card_id.description: The ID of the parent card associated with the logged time entry.

subtask_id.description: The ID of the subtask associated with the logged time entry, if applicable.

lane_id.description: The ID of the lane associated with the logged time entry.

column_id.description: The ID of the column associated with the logged time entry.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who created the logged time entry.

category_id.description: The ID of the category associated with the logged time entry.

date.description: The date for which the logged time entry was created, in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

time.description: The duration of the logged time entry, represented in seconds.

LoggedTimeHistoryEvent.title: Logged time history event
LoggedTimeHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for logged time.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for logged time.

logged_time_id.description: The unique identifier of logged time.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the logged time.

details.description:
Contains detailed information about the logged time associated with the event.

Both the `previous_state` and `changes` objects are included for the events of type `updated`, `updated_after_subtask_converted_to_card` and `transferred_to_card_after_subtask_deleted`. For events of type `created` and `deleted` only the `details` object is included.

previous_state.description: Contains the state of the logged time before the event, capturing its properties prior to the change.

changes.description: Contains the updated parameters reflecting changes made to the logged time.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

category_id.description: The unique identifier of the logged time category.

icon_type.description: The type of the icon associated with the card type. `0` represents a system icon, while `1` represents a user-defined icon.

icon_id.description: The ID of the icon used for the logged time category.

label.description: The label or name of the logged time category.

description.description: A description of the logged time category.

color.description: The color associated with the logged time category, represented in hexadecimal format.

availability.description:
The availability status of the logged time category.

A value of `0` represents **On-demand**, meaning the category can be manually added to or removed from boards.

A value of `1` represents **Auto**, meaning the category is automatically added to all newly created boards.

A value of `2` represents **Global**, meaning the category is automatically added to all boards across all workspaces. Once a category's availability is set to **Global**, only an Owner can change its availability again.

is_enabled.description: Indicates whether the logged time category is enabled or disabled. A value of `1` means the category is enabled, while a value of `0` means it is disabled.

LoggedTimeCategoryHistoryEvent.title: Logged time category history event
LoggedTimeCategoryHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for a logged time category.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a logged time category.

category_id.description: The unique identifier of a logged time category.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the logged time category.

details.description:
Contains detailed information about the logged time category associated with the event.

Both the `previous_state` and `changes` objects are included for the events of type `updated`, `disabled` and `enabled`. For events of type `created`, `deleted`, `added_to_board` and `removed_from_board` only the `details` object is included.

previous_state.description: Contains the state of the logged time category before the event, capturing its properties prior to the change.

changes.description: Contains the updated parameters reflecting changes made to the logged time category.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

position.description: The position of the linked card in the list of links. `0` represents the first position.

card_id.description: The ID of the linked card.

link_type.description: The type of the link between the cards.

position.description: The position of the linked card in the list of links. `0` represents the first position.

parent_id.description: The unique identifier of the parent card in the link.

child_id.description: The unique identifier of the child card in the link.

depth.description: The hierarchical level of the child card relative to the specified parent card. A direct child has a depth of `1`, its child has a depth of `2`, and so on.

PredecessorSuccessorLink.title: Predecessor-Successor Link in a Graph
PredecessorSuccessorLink.description: Represents the relationship between a predecessor card and a successor card in a hierarchical graph. Includes details about the depth of the link in the graph.

successor_id.description: The ID of the successor card.

predecessor_id.description: The ID of the predecessor card.

depth.description: The depth of the link in the graph, indicating the hierarchical level of the relationship.

SuccessorPredecessorLink.title: Successor-Predecessor Link in a Graph
SuccessorPredecessorLink.description: Represents the relationship between a successor card and a predecessor card in a hierarchical graph. Includes details about the depth of the link in the graph.

predecessor_id.description: The ID of the predecessor card.

successor_id.description: The ID of the successor card.

depth.description: The depth of the link in the graph, indicating the hierarchical level of the relationship.

Webhook.title: Webhook
Webhook.description: Represents a webhook configuration for a board.

url.description: The endpoint URL that will receive webhook notifications. Must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS address.

is_enabled.description: Indicates whether the webhook is enabled (`1`) or disabled (`0`). Disabled webhooks do not send notifications.

board_id.description: The ID of the board to which the webhook is attached.

WebhookHistoryEvent.title: Webhook history event
WebhookHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for a webhook.

id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a webhook.

webhook_id.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the webhook.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

details.description:
Contains detailed information about the webhook associated with the event.

Both the `previous_state` and `changes` objects are included for the events of type `updated`. For events of type `created` and `deleted` only the `details` object is included.

previous_state.description: Contains the state of the webhook before the event, capturing its properties prior to the change.

changes.description: Contains the updated parameters reflecting changes made to the webhook.

StickerHistoryEvent.title: Sticker history event
StickerHistoryEvent.description: Represents a single event in the sticker audit log, such as creation, update, enable/disable, deletion, or board assignment changes.

history_id.description: The ID of the sticker history event.

sticker_id.description: The ID of the sticker affected by the event.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action.

event_type.description:
The type of the event that occurred. Possible values include:
- `created`: Sticker was created.
- `updated`: Sticker was updated.
- `enabled`: Sticker was enabled.
- `disabled`: Sticker was disabled.
- `deleted`: Sticker was deleted.
- `added_to_board`: Sticker was added to a board.
- `removed_from_board`: Sticker was removed from a board.
- `updated_for_board`: Sticker properties were updated for a board.

details.description: Contains additional information about the event. The structure varies depending on the eventType.

oneOf.title: Created Event Details
oneOf.description: Details for `created` event. Contains the new sticker properties (except stickerId).

icon_id.description: The ID of the icon used for the sticker.

label.description: The name of the created sticker.

color.description: The color of the created sticker.

availability.description:
The availability status of the sticker.
- `0`: On-demand.
- `1`: Auto.
- `2`: Global.

icon_type.description: The type of the icon used for the sticker.

is_enabled.description:
The enabled status of the sticker.
- `0`: Disabled.
- `1`: Enabled.

oneOf.title: Updated Event Details
oneOf.description: Details for `updated` event. Contains previous state and changes.

previousState.description: The previous state of the sticker before the update.

icon_id.description: The ID of the icon used for the sticker.

label.description: The name of the sticker before the update.

color.description: The color of the sticker before the update.

availability.description: The availability status of the sticker before the update.

icon_type.description: The type of the icon used for the sticker before the update.

is_enabled.description:
The enabled status of the sticker before the update.
- `0`: Disabled.
- `1`: Enabled.

changes.description: The changes applied to the sticker.

icon_id.description: The new ID of the icon used for the sticker.

label.description: The new name of the sticker.

color.description: The new color of the sticker.

availability.description:
The new availability status of the sticker.
- `0`: On-demand.
- `1`: Auto.
- `2`: Global.

icon_type.description: The new type of the icon used for the sticker.

oneOf.title: Enabled Event Details
oneOf.description: Details for `enabled` event. Contains previous state and changes.

previousState.description: The previous state of the sticker before the update.

icon_id.description: The ID of the icon used for the sticker.

label.description: The name of the sticker before the update.

color.description: The color of the sticker before the update.

availability.description:
The availability status of the sticker before the update.
- `0`: On-demand.
- `1`: Auto.
- `2`: Global.

icon_type.description: The type of the icon used for the sticker before the update.

is_enabled.description:
The enabled status of the sticker before the update.
- `0`: Disabled.
- `1`: Enabled.

changes.description: The changes applied to the sticker.

is_enabled.description:
The new enabled status of the sticker.
- `1`: Enabled.

oneOf.title: Disabled Event Details
oneOf.description: Details `disabled` event. Contains previous state and changes.

previousState.description: The previous state of the sticker before the update.

icon_id.description: The ID of the icon used for the sticker.

label.description: The name of the sticker before the update.

color.description: The color of the sticker before the update.

availability.description:
The availability status of the sticker before the update.
- `0`: On-demand.
- `1`: Auto.
- `2`: Global.

icon_type.description: The type of the icon used for the sticker before the update.

is_enabled.description:
The enabled status of the sticker before the update.
- `0`: Disabled.
- `1`: Enabled.

changes.description: The changes applied to the sticker.

is_enabled.description:
The new disabled status of the sticker.
- `0`: Disabled.

oneOf.title: Deleted Event Details
oneOf.description: Details for `deleted` event. Contains the previous state of the deleted sticker (except stickerId).

icon_id.description: The ID of the icon used for the sticker.

label.description: The name of the created sticker.

color.description: The color of the created sticker.

availability.description:
The availability status of the sticker.
- `0`: On-demand.
- `1`: Auto.
- `2`: Global.

icon_type.description: The type of the icon used for the sticker.

is_enabled.description:
The enabled status of the sticker.
- `0`: Disabled.
- `1`: Enabled.

oneOf.title: Board Assignment Event Details
oneOf.description: Details for `added_to_board` event. Contains board assignment details.

board_id.description: The ID of the board the sticker was added to.

oneOf.title: Removed From Board Event Details
oneOf.description: Details for `removed_from_board` event. Contains board assignment details.

board_id.description: The ID of the board the sticker was removed from.

oneOf.title: Updated For Board Event Details
oneOf.description: Details for `updated_for_board` event. Contains previous board state and changes.

previousState.description: The previous sticker assignment state for the board.

board_id.description: The ID of the board the sticker was assigned to.

limit_per_board.description: The previous limit of the sticker per board.

limit_per_card.description: The previous limit of the sticker per card.

changes.description: The changes applied to the sticker assignment for the board.

limit_per_board.description: The new limit of the sticker per board.

limit_per_card.description: The new limit of the sticker per card.

time.description: The date and time when the event occurred, in ISO 8601 format.

TagHistoryEvent.title: Tag history event
TagHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for a tag.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a tag.

tag_id.description: The unique identifier of the tag.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the tag.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

details.description:
Contains detailed information about the tag associated with the event.

Both the `previous_state` and `changes` objects are included for the events of type `updated`, `disabled` and `enabled`. For events of type `created`, `deleted`, `added_to_board` and `removed_from_board` only the `details` object is included.

previous_state.description: Contains the state of the tag before the event, capturing its properties prior to the change.

changes.description: Contains the updated parameters reflecting changes made to the tag.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

MilestoneHistoryEvent.title: Milestone history event
MilestoneHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for a milestone.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a milestone.

milestone_id.description: The unique identifier of a milestone.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the milestone.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

details.description:
Contains detailed information about the milestone associated with the event.

Both the `previous_state` and `changes` objects are included for the events of type `updated`, `disabled` and `enabled`. For events of type `created`, `deleted`, `added_to_board` and `removed_from_board` only the `details` object is included.

previous_state.description: Contains the state of the milestone before the event, capturing its properties prior to the change.

changes.description: Contains the updated parameters reflecting changes made to the milestone.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

CardTemplateHistoryEvent.title: Card template history event
CardTemplateHistoryEvent.description: Represents an event recorded when a create, update, or delete action is performed on a card template resource. This includes details about the action, the user who performed it, and the time it occurred.

history_id.description: The ID of the history event.

template_id.description: The ID of the card template associated with the event.

event_type.description: The type of the event performed on the card template (e.g., created, updated, deleted).

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action.

details.description: Additional details about the event, such as changes made.

time.description: The date and time when the event occured, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

CardTypeHistoryEvent.title: Card type history event
CardTypeHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded when an update, delete or create action is executed on a card type resource.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of the history event.

type_id.description: The ID of the card type associated with the event.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action associated with the event.

event_type.description: The type of the event performed on the card type (e.g., created, updated, deleted).

time.description: The date and time when the event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

CardOutcomeHistoryEvent.title: Card outcome History Event
CardOutcomeHistoryEvent.description: Represents the data for a historical event associated with a card outcome, including details about changes made to the outcome over time.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of the history event.

outcome_id.description: The unique identifier of the card outcome associated with the event.

event_type.description:
The type of the event. Possible values are: 
 - `1`: Outcome created 
 - `2`: Outcome updated 
 - `3`: Outcome deleted 
 - `11`: Outcome value added 
 - `12`: Outcome value updated 
 - `13`: Outcome value deleted 
 - `21`: Checkpoint added 
 - `22`: Checkpoint updated 
 - `23`: Checkpoint deleted

event_guid.description: A globally unique identifier for the event.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user who performed the action associated with the event.

old_value.description: The state of the outcome before the event occurred, if applicable.

changes.description: The changes made during the event.

time.description: The date when the event occurred.

ArrivalRuleHistoryEvent.title: Arrival rule history event
ArrivalRuleHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, delete, rule enabled, rule disabled action is performed for an arrival rule.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for an arrival rule.

rule_id.description: The unique identifier of an arrival rule.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the arrival rule.

details.description: Contains detailed information about the arrival rule associated with the event.

rule_id.description: The unique identifier of an arrival rule.

name.description: The name of the rule. Multiple rules **can** have the **same** name.

is_enabled.description: Indicates whether the rule is enabled.

workflow_id.description: The ID of the workflow to which the rule applies.

lane_id.description: The ID of the lane to which the rule applies.

column_id.description: The ID of the column to which the rule applies. **Cannot** be used in combination with `area_id`.

area_id.description: The ID of the merged area to which the rule applies. **Cannot** be used in combination with `column_id`.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

BaiPromptHistoryEvent.title: BAI prompt history event
BaiPromptHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for a BAI prompt.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a BAI prompt.

prompt_id.description: The unique identifier of a BAI prompt.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the BAI prompt.

details.description: Contains detailed information about the BAI prompt associated with the event.

type.description: The type of the BAI prompt. **Comments and Emails**, **Subtasks** and **Summaries** prompts correspond respectively to the values `1`, `2` and `3`.

color.description: The color of the BAI prompt in hexadecimal format.

icon_id.description: The unique identifier for the icon associated with the BAI prompt.

name.description: The **unique** name assigned to the BAI prompt.

context.description: Describes the general situation in which the AI assistant will operate.

topics.description: Contains a list of additional important topics to include in the generated content. This is available **only** for **Comments and Emails** and **Subtasks** BAI prompts.

fields_instructions.description: Instructions for the AI model on how to use the selected fields.

suggest_missing_topics.description: Indicates whether the AI model can suggesttopics that may be missing from the generated content.

fields.description:
An array of objects that specifies the **card properties** (e.g, Title, Description, Subtasks) to be sent to the AI model for analysis.

The **order** of the objects reflects the **priority**, with the most important properties listed first.

Each object defines a specific field type and name.

field_type.description: Determines the type of field being sent for analysis to the AI model. Default fields like **Title**, **Description**, etc., are of type `plain`, while custom fields are marked as `custom`.

field_name.description: For fields of type `plain`, the name is stated explicitly (e.g., **Title**, **Description**). For fields of type `custom`, the field is represented by the [ID of the custom field](#/operations/getCustomFields#Request).

icon_type.description: The type of the icon associated with the BAI prompt. `0` represents a system icon, while `1` represents a user-defined icon.

board_id.description: The unique identifier of the board where the BAI prompt is used.

author_user_id.description: The ID of the user who created the BAI prompt.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

BlockReasonHistoryEvent.title: Block reason history event
BlockReasonHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for a block reason.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a block reason.

reason_id.description: The unique identifier of a block reason.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the block reason.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

details.description:
Contains detailed information about the block reason associated with the event.

The `previous_state` and `changes` objects are included only for the following event types: `reason_updated`, `reason_added_to_board`, and `reason_removed_from_board`.

previous_state.description: Contains the state of the block reason before the event, capturing its properties prior to the change.

changes.description: Contains the updated parameters reflecting changes made to the block reason.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

DepartureRuleHistoryEvent.title: Departure rule history event
DepartureRuleHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, delete, rule enabled, rule disabled action is performed for a departure rule.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a departure rule.

rule_id.description: The unique identifier of a departure rule.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the departure rule.

details.description: Contains detailed information about the departure rule associated with the event.

rule_id.description: The unique identifier of a departure rule.

name.description: The name of the rule. Multiple rules **can** have the **same** name.

is_enabled.description: Indicates whether the rule is enabled.

workflow_id.description: The ID of the workflow to which the rule applies.

lane_id.description: The ID of the lane to which the rule applies.

column_id.description: The ID of the column to which the rule applies. **Cannot** be used in combination with `area_id`.

area_id.description: The ID of the merged area to which the rule applies. **Cannot** be used in combination with `column_id`.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

DiscardReasonHistoryEvent.title: Discard reason history event
DiscardReasonHistoryEvent.description: An event recorded whenever a create, update, or delete action is performed for a discard reason.

history_id.description: The unique identifier of a history event for a discard reason.

reason_id.description: The unique identifier of a discard reason.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who performed the action on the discard reason.

event_type.description: The type of the history event.

details.description:
Contains detailed information about the discard reason associated with the event.

Both the `previous_state` and `changes` objects are included for the events of type `updated`, `disabled` and `enabled`. For events of type `created`, `deleted`, `added_to_board` and `removed_from_board` only the `details` object is included.

previous_state.description: Contains the state of the discard reason before the event, capturing its properties prior to the change.

changes.description: Contains the updated parameters reflecting changes made to the discard reason.

time.description: The timestamp indicating when the history event occurred, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

announcement_id.description: The unique identifier of the internal announcement.

title.description: The title of the internal announcement.

description.description: The content of the internal announcement.

cover_image_link.description: The URL of the cover image for the internal announcement. If not set, a default cover image should be used.

for_everyone.description: Indicates whether the internal announcement is visible to all users.

for_owners.description: Indicates whether the internal announcement is visible only to owners.

for_workspace_managers.description: Indicates whether the internal announcement is visible only to workspace managers.

for_role_ids.description: A list of role IDs that the internal announcement is visible to.

for_team_ids.description: A list of team IDs that the internal announcement is visible to.

is_popover.description: Indicates whether the internal announcement should be displayed as a popover.

start_time.description: The date and time when the internal announcement becomes active.

end_time.description: The date and time when the internal announcement expires. If not set, the announcement remains active indefinitely.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the internal announcement is currently active.

recurring_definition.description: Specifies the recurring schedule for the internal announcement, if applicable.

type.description:
The type of recurrence.
- `cron`: A cron expression for advanced scheduling.
- `every_day`: Recurs every day at a specific time.
- `every_month`: Recurs every month on a specific date.
- `every_week`: Recurs every week on a specific day.
- `every_workday`: Recurs every workday (Monday to Friday).
- `predefined_interval`: Recurs at a predefined interval, starting from a specific date.

execute_at_hour.description: The hour at which the internal announcement should recur.

expression.description: A cron expression for advanced scheduling.

at_dates.description: A list of dates in the month when the internal announcement should recur.

at_last_day.description: Indicates whether the internal announcement should recur on the last day of the month.

weekdays.description: A list of weekdays when the internal announcement should recur.

start_date.description: The date from which the internal announcement should start recurring, in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

days.description: The number of days between each recurrence of the internal announcement.

announcement_id.description: The unique identifier of the announcement.

description.description: The content of the announcement.

cover_image_link.description: The URL of the cover image for the announcement. If not set, a default cover image should be used.

is_popover.description: Indicates whether the announcement should be displayed as a popover.

start_time.description: The date and time when the announcement becomes active, in ISO 8601 format including a time zone designator.

end_time.description: The date and time when the announcement expires, in ISO 8601 format including a time zone designator. If not set, the announcement remains active indefinitely.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the announcement is currently active.

is_seen.description: Indicates whether the announcement has been seen by the active user.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who made the request.

ApiRequestHistoryAggregated.title: An aggregated API request history event
ApiRequestHistoryAggregated.description: An event recorded for each request execution torwards the API aggregated by parameters

user_id.description: The ID of the user who made the request.

request_count.description: The number of requests made by the user in the specified aggregation period.

time.description:
The start of the aggregation period when the API request was executed, in `ISO 8601` format with timezone offset.

If the aggregation period specified in the query is `day`, all requests made by a user within that day will be grouped under a single timestamp, e.g. `2025-01-01T00:00:00+00:00`.

If the aggregation period is `hour`, requests are grouped by each hour, with timestamps indicating the start of the hour block, e.g. `2025-01-01T01:00:00+00:00`.

JsonExportWorkspaces.title: Json export
JsonExportWorkspaces.description: Contains the exported workspace management history data in JSON format.

data.description: Contains the exported data.

titles.description:
An array of column titles for the exported data.
Each title represents a field included in the export, such as "Event Type", "Workspace name", "Author", "Details", or "Time".

items.description: The exported items.

Each item in the array corresponds to a row in the exported data, with values matching the titles.
The order of items in each row should match the order of titles.

The value of the field in the exported data. For example, if the title is "Event Type", the item might be fro example "Created" or "Archived".
Event types and description are:
 - `Created`: "The workspace has been created."
 - `Updated`: "The workspace name has been changed from ... to ... ." or "The workspace has been reordered within the dashboard ... ."
 - `Archived`: "The workspace has been archived."
 - `Unarchived`: "The workspace has been unarchived."
 - `Board Created`: "A board ... has been created."
 - `Board renamed`: "The board name has been changed from ... to ... ."
 - `Board deleted`: "The board ... has been deleted."
 - `Board archived`: "The board ... has been archived."
 - `Board unarchived`: "The board ... has been unarchived."
 - `Board moved from workspace`: "The board ... has been moved to another workspace."
 - `Board moved to workspace`: "The board ... has been moved to this workspace."
 - `Workspace manager added`: "The user ... has been added as a workspace manager."
 - `Workspace manager removed`: "The user ... has been removed as a workspace manager."
 - `Added to dashboard`: "The workspace has been added to the dashboard ... ."
 - `Removed from dashboard`: "The workspace has been removed from the dashboard ... ."

JsonExportBoards.title: Json export
JsonExportBoards.description: Contains the exported board management history data in JSON format.

data.description: The exported board management history data.

titles.description:
An array of column titles for the exported data.
Each title represents a field included in the export, such as "Event Type", "Board Name", "Author", "Details", or "Time".

items.description:
An array of exported rows.
Each row is an array of values, where the order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.
Each value corresponds to a specific field for a board management event.

Each item in the array represents a single exported event.
The order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.

The value for the corresponding column in the exported data.
For example, if the title is "Event Type", the value might be "Board Created" or "Board Archived".

**Event types and their descriptions:**
- `Board created`: The board has been created.
- `Board updated`: The board settings have been changed (e.g., name, description, card size type, limits, default sender/receiver, etc.).
- `Board archived`: The board has been archived.
- `Board unarchived`: The board has been unarchived.
- `Board moved`: The board has been moved from one workspace to another.
- `Workflow created`: A workflow (card, initiative, or timeline) has been created on the board.
- `Workflow updated`: The workflow name or position has been changed.
- `Workflow deleted`: The workflow has been deleted from the board.
- `Workflow disabled`: The workflow has been disabled.
- `Workflow enabled`: The workflow has been enabled.
- `Lane created`: A lane has been created on the board.
- `Lane renamed`: The lane name has been changed.
- `Lane deleted`: The lane has been deleted from the board.
- `Lane moved`: The lane position has been changed.
- `Column created`: A column has been created on the board.
- `Column renamed`: The column name has been changed.
- `Column deleted`: The column has been deleted from the board.
- `Column moved`: The column has been moved, reordered, or changed between main/subcolumn or workflow sections.
- `Cell limits updated`: The cell limits have been updated.
- `Lane section limits updated`: The lane section limits have been updated.
- `Merged areas updated`: The merged areas have been updated.
- `Related boards updated`: Related boards have been added or removed.
- `User added to board`: A user has been added to the board with a specific board role.
- `User removed from board`: A user has been removed from the board.
- `User board role changed`: The board role of a user has been changed.
- `Discard reason added to board`: A discard reason has been added to the board.
- `Discard reason removed from board`: A discard reason has been removed from the board.
- `Block reason added to board`: A block reason has been added to the board.
- `Block reason removed from board`: A block reason has been removed from the board.
- `Sticker added to board`: A sticker has been added to the board.
- `Sticker removed from board`: A sticker has been removed from the board.
- `Card type added to board`: A card type has been added to the board.
- `Card type removed from board`: A card type has been removed from the board.
- `Tag added to board`: A tag has been added to the board.
- `Tag removed from board`: A tag has been removed from the board.
- `Card template added to board`: A card template has been added to the board.
- `Card template removed from board`: A card template has been removed from the board.
- `Custom field added to board`: A custom field has been added to the board.
- `Custom field removed from board`: A custom field has been removed from the board.
- `Team added to board`: A team has been added to the board with a specific board role.
- `Team role changed for board`: The board role of a team has been changed.
- `Team removed from board`: A team has been removed from the board.
- `Cell card orderings updated`: The cell card ordering has been updated.
- `Default board card and initiative view settings updated`: The default board card and initiative view settings have been updated.
- `Logged time category added to board`: A logged time category has been added to the board.
- `Logged time category removed from board`: A logged time category has been removed from the board.
- `Cycle time columns added to board`: Columns have been added to the board cycle time configuration.
- `Cycle time columns removed from board`: Columns have been removed from the board cycle time configuration.

The value for each event type may include additional details, such as the previous and new values for changed settings, names of users, teams, columns, or other entities involved in the event.

JsonExportUsers.title: Json export
JsonExportUsers.description: Contains the exported user management history data in JSON format.

data.description: The exported user management history data.

titles.description:
An array of column titles for the exported data.
Each title represents a field included in the export, such as:
- "Event Type"
- "Author"
- "Author Email"
- "Affected User"
- "Affected User Email"
- "Details"
- "Time (timezone)"
The order of titles matches the order of values in each exported row.

items.description:
An array of exported rows.
Each row is an array of values, where the order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.
Each value corresponds to a specific field for a user management event.

Each item in the array represents a single exported event.
The order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.

The value for the corresponding column in the exported data.
For example, if the title is "Event Type", the value might be "User confirmed", "Email changed", "Added to team", etc.

**Event types and their descriptions:**
- `User confirmed`: The user has accepted an invitation or was created via SSO.
- `User invited`: The user was invited to join the account.
- `User re-invited`: The user was re-invited to join the account.
- `User deleted`: The user account was deleted.
- `Email changed`: The user's email address was changed.
- `Username changed`: The user's username was changed.
- `Realname changed`: The user's real name was changed.
- `Avatar changed`: The user's avatar was changed.
- `Email signature changed`: The user's email signature was changed.
- `TFA changed`: The user's two-factor authentication settings were modified.
- `TFA enabled`: Two-factor authentication was enabled.
- `TFA disabled`: Two-factor authentication was disabled.
- `TFA key changed`: The user's TFA key was changed.
- `TFA key reset`: The user's TFA key was reset.
- `Api key changed`: The user's API key was changed.
- `Timezone changed`: The user's timezone was changed.
- `Language changed`: The user's language preference was changed.
- `Password changed`: The user's password was changed.
- `User disabled`: The user account was disabled.
- `User enabled`: The user account was enabled.
- `WIP limits changed`: The user's work-in-progress limits were changed.
- `Global privilege added`: A global privilege was granted to the user.
- `Global privilege removed`: A global privilege was revoked from the user.
- `Assigned as Workspace Manager`: The user was assigned as a workspace manager.
- `Unassigned as Workspace Manager`: The user was unassigned as a workspace manager.
- `Assigned to board`: The user was assigned to a board with a specific role.
- `Unassigned from board`: The user was unassigned from a board.
- `Board role changed`: The user's board role was changed.
- `Added to team`: The user was added to a team.
- `Removed from team`: The user was removed from a team.
- `Added to team managers`: The user was added as a team manager.
- `Removed from team managers`: The user was removed as a team manager.
- `Added to dashboard page`: The user was added to a dashboard page.
- `Change permissions for dashboard page`: The user's dashboard page permissions were changed.
- `Removed from dashboard page`: The user was removed from a dashboard page.
- `User attribute added`: A user attribute was added.
- `User attribute updated`: A user attribute was updated.
- `User attribute removed`: A user attribute was removed.

The "Details" column provides a human-readable description of the event, including usernames, emails, board names, team names, role names, attribute names, and any relevant value changes.
If a referenced entity (user, board, team, etc.) has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted [entity]**".

titles.description:
An array of column titles for the exported data.

items.description:
An array of exported rows.
Each row is an array of values, where the order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.
Each value corresponds to a specific field for an email integration error event.

Each item in the array represents a single exported email integration error event.
The order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.

An array of exported rows.
Each row is an array of values, where the order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.
Each value corresponds to a specific field for an email integration error event.

**Possible values for each column:**
- "Sender": The email address of the sender (e.g. {senderEmail}).
- "Receivers": A semicolon-separated list of receiver email addresses (e.g. {receiverEmail1}; {receiverEmail2}).
- "Subject": The subject of the email (e.g. {subject}).
- "Details": The error message describing the issue that occurred while processing the email. Possible values include:
    - "Failed to process email due to invalid format"
    - "Attachment missing"
    - "Timeout while processing"
    - "No card found for this email"
    - "Failed to create card"
    - "Failed to update card"
    - "Invalid event type"
    - "Invalid receiver address"
    - "Invalid sender address"
    - "Invalid integration email"
    - "Invalid subject"
    - "Invalid attachment"
    - "Invalid card data"
    - "Invalid board ID"
    - "Invalid workflow ID"
    - "Invalid API key"
    - "Request timed out"
    - "Network error"
    - "Server error"
    - "Client error"
    - "Unknown error"
    - "Processed Unsuccessfully"
    - "Processed Successfully"
    - If the error message is an API error, only the parsed error string will be shown, such as:
        - "Card not found"
        - "Invalid card ID"
        - "Permission denied"
        - "Board is archived"
        - "Malformed request"
        - "Unknown error"
- "Received at (timezone)": The date and time when the email was received, formatted according to the user's timezone (e.g. {YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss}).
- "Card id": The unique identifier of the card associated with the error (e.g. {cardId}), or null if not applicable.
- "Event type": The type of event related to the error. Possible values:
    - "Card Created"
    - "Card Updated"
    - null

The value for each field may include additional details, such as formatted dates, parsed API error messages, and event type names. User-defined information such as email addresses, subjects, and card IDs will appear in the corresponding fields.

Each value corresponds to a specific field for a webhook history event.

**Possible values for each column:**
- "Event Type": "Created", "Updated", "Deleted"
- "Username": The username of the user who performed the action, or "**Deleted User**" if the user no longer exists.
- "Details":
    - For "Created": "{Username} has created a webhook URL {Webhook URL} on {Board name} board."
    - For "Updated" (URL change): "{Username} has changed a webhook URL from {Old webhook URL} to {New webhook URL} on {Board name} board."
    - For "Updated" (enabled): "{Username} has enabled a webhook URL {Webhook URL} on {Board name} board."
    - For "Updated" (disabled): "{Username} has disabled a webhook URL {Webhook URL} on {Board name} board."
    - For "Deleted": "{Username} has deleted a webhook URL {Webhook URL} on {Board name} board."
    - If the board or user is deleted: "**Deleted User** has deleted a webhook URL {Webhook URL} on **Deleted Board** board."
- "Time (timezone)": The date and time of the event, formatted according to the user's timezone (e.g. "2025-08-06 09:15:25").

The "Details" column provides a human-readable description of the event, including usernames, webhook URLs, board names, and the type of change. If a referenced entity (user or board) has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted User**" or "**Deleted Board**".

    - "A role was added"
    - "A role was removed"
    - "A team was added"
    - "A team was removed"
- "Username": The username of the user who performed the action, or "**Deleted User**" if the user no longer exists.
- "Details": Human-readable description of the event, including announcement title, role name, team name, and changes. For example:
    - "{username} has created an internal announcement {title}."
    - "{username} has updated the {title} internal announcement. The title has been changed from {oldTitle} to {newTitle}."
    - "{username} has deleted the announcement {title}."
    - "{username} has added a role {roleName} to {title} internal announcement."
    - "{username} has removed the managing role {roleName} from {title} internal announcement."
    - "{username} has added a team {teamName} to {title} internal announcement."
    - "{username} has removed the team {teamName} from {title} internal announcement."
    - If a referenced entity (user, role, team, or announcement) has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted User**", "**Deleted Role**", "**Deleted Team**", or "**Deleted Announcement**".
- "Time (timezone)": The date and time of the event, formatted according to the user's timezone (e.g. "2025-08-06 09:15:25").

The "Details" column provides a human-readable description of the event, including usernames, announcement titles, role names, team names, and the type of change. If a referenced entity has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted User**", "**Deleted Role**", "**Deleted Team**", or "**Deleted Announcement**".

JsonExportBAIPrompts.title: Json export
JsonExportBAIPrompts.description:
Contains the exported BAI prompts management history data in JSON format.
The export includes a list of BAI prompt management events, with each row representing a single event and its details.
Pagination information is included in the response.

data.description:
The exported BAI prompts management history data.
Includes column titles and the corresponding event data for each row.
The columns are:
- "Event Type"
- "Username"
- "Details"
- "Time (timezone)"

titles.description:
An array of column titles for the exported data.
Each title represents a field included in the export, such as "Event Type", "Username", "Details", or "Time (timezone)".
The order of titles matches the order of values in each exported row.

items.description:
An array of exported rows.
Each row is an array of values, where the order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.
Each value corresponds to a specific field for a BAI prompt management history event.

**Possible values for each column:**
- "Event Type": The type of event, such as:
    - "Created"
    - "Updated"
    - "Deleted"
- "Username": The username of the user who performed the action, or "**Deleted User**" if the user no longer exists.
- "Details": Human-readable description of the event, including prompt name and changes. For example:
    - "{username} has created a BAI prompt {name}."
    - "{username} has updated the {name} BAI prompt. The name has been changed from {oldName} to {newName}."
    - "{username} has deleted the BAI prompt {name}."
    - If a referenced entity (user or prompt) has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted User**" or "**Deleted Prompt**".
- "Time (timezone)": The date and time of the event, formatted according to the user's timezone (e.g. "2025-08-06 09:15:25").

The "Details" column provides a human-readable description of the event, including usernames, prompt names, and the type of change. If a referenced entity has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted User**" or "**Deleted Prompt**".

JsonExportRoles.title: Json export
JsonExportRoles.description:
Contains the exported roles management history data in JSON format.
The export includes a list of roles management events, with each row representing a single event and its details.
Pagination information is included in the response.

data.description:

titles.description:
An array of column titles for the exported data.
Each title represents a field included in the export, such as "Event Type", "Username", "Details", or "Time (timezone)".
The order of titles matches the order of values in each exported row.

items.description:
An array of exported rows.
Each row is an array of values, where the order of values matches the order of the `titles` array.
Each value corresponds to a specific field for a roles management history event.

**Possible values for each column:**
- "Event Type": The type of event, such as:
    - "Created"
    - "Renamed"
    - "Deleted"
    - "Permissions Changed"
- "Username": The username of the user who performed the action, or "**Deleted User**" if the user no longer exists.
- "Details": Human-readable description of the event, including role name, previous name, permission changes, and other changes. For example:
    - "{username} has created a role {name}."
    - "{username} has renamed the role {oldName} to {newName}."
    - "{username} has deleted the role {name}."
    - "{username} has added Card details and Delete card permissions for role {name}."
    - If a referenced entity (user or role) has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted User**" or "**Deleted Role**".
- "Time (timezone)": The date and time of the event, formatted according to the user's timezone (e.g. "2025-08-06 09:15:25").

The "Details" column provides a human-readable description of the event, including usernames, role names, permission changes, and the type of change. If a referenced entity has been deleted, its value will be shown as "**Deleted User**" or "**Deleted Role**".
